query:
-- Check the distribution of discrepancy types
-- Are these services with revenue > 0 but NO billing items at all (manually set revenue)?
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingItemSum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noMatchedBillingItems,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingItemSum > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasBillingItemsButMismatch,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM (
  SELECT 
    s.externalId,
    s.monthlyRevenue,
    COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as billingItemSum
  FROM services s
  LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  WHERE s.status = 'active'
    AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  GROUP BY s.externalId, s.monthlyRevenue
  HAVING ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) > 0.01
) sub;

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingItemSum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noMatchedBillingItems,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingItemSum > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasBillingItemsButMismatch,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM (
  SELECT 
    s.externalId,
    s.monthlyRevenue,
    COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as billingItemSum
  FROM services s
  LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  WHERE s.status = 'active'
    AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  GROUP BY s.externalId, s.monthlyRevenue
  HAVING ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) > 0.01
) sub;
